name: telnyx-more
description: Separate Cypress subproject for Telnyx.com responsive and UI coverage

scripts.cy:run:smoke: npx cypress run --config-file cypress.config.js --browser chrome --env grepTags=@smoke
scripts.cy:run:regression: npx cypress run --config-file cypress.config.js --browser chrome --env grepTags=@regression
scripts.report: npm run report:merge && npm run report:generate
